creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
wpa_gui 2.6_1 builds and runs fine for me.

It sounds like you have a mix of newer and older qt5-* packages installed (for 
example some from Qt 5.9 and some from Qt 5.10), so a rebuild of every Qt 5
related port is probably in order.  I think this is outside of the scope of
Bugzilla however and if you need help with that come to the FreeBSD forums.

http://forums.freebsd.org/
